variants.core_promise: A safety-first herbal home-reference that helps you choose and use common natural remedies more cautiously—featuring clear “do-not-use-if” rules, interaction/contraindication highlights, and a Fake-Spotter™ buying checklist to reduce the risk of wasting money on low-quality or counterfeit products. Educational content only; not medical advice.

novelty_score.diagnosis: Information value: 0.58 (PASSES 0.35 threshold). 2 novel, 3 incremental, 0 redundant.
most_novel_elements: Fake-Spotter™ Checklist (marketplace red flags + seller verification steps + label/packaging sanity checks)
“Do-Not-Use-If” & Caution Flags Index (common contraindications + escalation prompts)

weak_coverage.objection: “Most online herbal advice feels untrustworthy or salesy.”
“How do I avoid fake/counterfeit supplements or books?”

variants.pricing_rationale: Positioned as a premium, safety-first alternative to “miracle remedy” handbooks. Value is driven by risk-reduction utilities (checklists, caution flags, clinician prompt sheets) rather than outcome promises; price can sit above generic herbal compilations while staying accessible for evidence-seeking buyers.

Educational content only; not medical advice.

variants.core_promise: The “Medication-Interaction QuickCheck” bundle: a safety-first herbal handbook plus a fast interaction-screening workflow (what to ask, what to double-check, when to avoid) and a Fake-Spotter™ checklist—built for evidence-seeking buyers who want fewer surprises when combining supplements with prescriptions. Educational content only; not medical advice.

objection_score.diagnosis: Coverage: 83.3%. 1 uncovered, 5 weakly covered. Unknown-unknowns: MISSING.

weak_coverage.objection: “I’m on prescriptions (e.g., blood thinners). How do I know what to avoid?”
“I need a fast way to screen before I buy or try something.”
“I don’t know what to ask my pharmacist/doctor.”

variants.pricing_rationale: Priced for practicality: the buyer isn’t paying for “results,” but for a repeatable pre-use safety workflow and communication templates that reduce decision friction and increase confidence when discussing supplements with clinicians—positioned away from broad ‘synergy’ remedy pitches.
